MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

Appearances:

Karen Uchiyama, Esq. for Plaintiff Rong Liu.
Jonathan DeGooyer, Esq. representing the Defendant Ann Collins through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Michelle Brant, litigant(s) and counsel confer privately in Room 502, 503, 504, 503-B,
for settlement discussions.

Case settled, Trial Date vacated.
Stipulated judgment and settlement agreement, filed in court.
